filePurposes.runtime.js: Webpack 5 bootstrap: provides __webpack_require__, __webpack_register__, __webpack_chunk_load__, __webpack_get_module__. Manages module cache, chunk loading via dynamic script injection. Must load first.
filePurposes.vendors.js: Vendor modules: EventEmitter(0), tiny-md5(1), validator(2), base64(3), debounce-throttle(4), cookie-helper(5). Registered via __webpack_register__.
filePurposes.app.js: 9 tracker modules (10-18): init(10), page-view(11), click-heatmap(12), scroll-depth(13), form-watcher(14), cart-tracker(15), session(16), errors(17), user-id(18). Module 10 creates __TRACKER_EVENT_BUS__ and __TRACKER_CONFIG__.
filePurposes.analytics.js: 5 analytics modules (20-24): event-aggregator(20), sampling-engine(21) at 10%, batch-builder(22) with MD5, dimension-builder(23), throttle-controller(24) with token bucket.
filePurposes.sender.js: 4 sender modules (30-33): transport-xhr(30), transport-beacon(31), retry-queue(32) with exponential backoff 5 retries, payload-builder+HMAC(33) with signing key.

dataFlow: App tracker modules (11-18) emit events on __TRACKER_EVENT_BUS__ → analytics module 20 (aggregator) collects → module 21 (sampling) filters at 10% → module 22 (batch-builder) groups into __BATCH_QUEUE__ with MD5 batch ID → module 24 (throttle) controls rate → sender module 33 (payload-builder) builds payload, base64-encodes, HMAC signs → module 32 (retry-queue) enqueues → module 30 (transport-xhr) POST to endpoint (10s timeout) → on failure: module 31 (beacon) fallback with exponential retry (1→2→4→8→16s, max 5)

endpoints.purpose: Submit batched behavioral tracking events with HMAC signature
